pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm H. It's a bit of a high-pressure room, isn't it? What's your name, and how are you feeling about all this?
Nice to meet you, H, I'm E. It definitely feels tense in here, but I'm just trying to stay focused since I really need to bring something home for my family. How about you?
I hear you, I'm in the same boat—I've got people counting on me back home, so I'm pretty determined to walk away with something.
That makes two of us then. It’s a lot of pressure when it’s not just for yourself, right?
For sure, it makes every decision feel a lot heavier. Have you thought much about how you're going to approach the prize pool once it starts?
I'm still weighing it up, but I'd prefer to work with people rather than against them if it means we all actually get paid—what’s your take?
I’m on the same page. Working together seems like the smartest way to make sure we actually bring that money home.
I agree. If we can get a few more people to see it that way, we'll all be in much better shape.
Exactly. Have you had a chance to talk to anyone else yet and see where their heads are at?
Not yet, I'm just about to start making my rounds. I'm glad we're on the same page though, let's keep an eye out for each other.
Sounds like a plan, let's definitely have each other's backs. Good luck with your rounds and I'll see you when it kicks off.
